analysis.summary: Megz C is a 36-year-old female reporting severe fatigue (6/10) for the past few days, currently taking only vitamins with no known allergies or significant medical history.

flags.title: Unexplained Fatigue
flags.description: Monitor for resolution of fatigue. If symptoms worsen, new symptoms appear, or persist beyond a week, further investigation may be warranted.

possible_conditions.name: Lack of Sleep/Stress
possible_conditions.explanation: Insufficient sleep, poor sleep quality, or high stress levels are frequent causes of feeling very tired.

possible_conditions.name: Viral Infection (e.g., common cold, flu)
possible_conditions.explanation: Many common viral infections can cause fatigue, often as an initial symptom, which typically resolves within a few days to a week.

possible_conditions.name: Early Pregnancy
possible_conditions.explanation: Fatigue is a very common early symptom of pregnancy due to hormonal changes, relevant for a 36-year-old female.

possible_conditions.name: Nutritional Deficiency
possible_conditions.explanation: Deficiencies in essential nutrients like iron (anemia) or B12 can lead to significant fatigue, even if taking general vitamins.

possible_conditions.name: Hypothyroidism
possible_conditions.explanation: An underactive thyroid gland can slow down metabolism, leading to persistent tiredness, among other symptoms.

recommendations: Ensure adequate rest and optimize sleep hygiene.
Monitor for any new or worsening symptoms, such as fever, body aches, sore throat, or changes in mood.
Maintain good hydration and a balanced diet.
Consider avoiding strenuous activities for a few days to allow for recovery.
questions_for_doctor: Could you describe 'very tired' more specifically (e.g., difficulty concentrating, muscle weakness, lethargy)?
Are you experiencing any other subtle symptoms, such as headache, muscle aches, sore throat, or changes in appetite?
What specific vitamins are you currently taking?
What is your typical sleep duration and quality like?
Have there been any recent changes in your diet, stress levels, or daily routine?
Is there any possibility of pregnancy?
